title: DataLoom — AI Data Pipeline Studio
description: ★ Transforms raw CSV/Excel files into production-ready analytics in 4 stages: Ingest → Refine → Enrich → Deploy ★ AI auto-profiles data quality, detects and fixes nulls, type mismatches and outliers ★ Generates KPIs with interactive charts and extracts business insights with anomaly detection ★ Exports clean datasets with PySpark pipeline code ★ Real-time progress tracking, transformation timeline, and one-click exports
impact: End-to-end automated data pipeline from raw upload to production-ready analytics with AI-powered cleaning and visualization.

title: SleepLens — AI Sleep Health Intelligence
description: ★ AI-powered sleep health platform assessing cardiometabolic risk from sleep patterns ★ Sleep score gauge with circadian alignment and chronotype detection ★ 6-factor cardiometabolic risk radar: hypertension, diabetes, cardiovascular, metabolic syndrome, cognitive, immune ★ Sleep disorder screening for apnea, insomnia, RLS ★ 5 ranked clinical recommendations and personalized 7-day sleep reset plan ★ Grounded in AASM and AHA clinical guidelines
impact: Comprehensive sleep health intelligence report with clinical-grade cardiometabolic risk assessment and personalized improvement protocols.

title: AI Student Care Assistant
description: ★ AI-powered assistant supporting university students with academic advising, mental health resources, and campus navigation ★ RAG pipelines and LLMs for contextual, empathetic responses ★ Sentiment detection with crisis keyword monitoring ★ 10+ real UA campus resources with phone numbers and URLs
impact: Reduced student wait times by 60% and handled 2,000+ queries in pilot deployment.

title: DiaBuddy AI — Diabetes Companion
description: ★ Full-stack AI diabetes management app with glucose/food/activity tracking ★ RAG-powered chat grounded in ADA/NIH/CDC guidelines ★ Dashboards with trend charts, time-in-range analysis, estimated A1C ★ Personalized insights from 28+ curated medical knowledge chunks
impact: End-to-end health tracking with AI chat citing 28+ curated medical knowledge chunks.

title: Bio Scholar AI — Biomedical Research Assistant
description: ★ RAG-powered biomedical research tool for querying scientific literature ★ Paper summarizer via PubMed PMID/URL ★ Structured summaries with key findings, methods, and clinical relevance ★ Entity extraction and clinical insights
impact: Instant structured summaries of biomedical papers with entity extraction and clinical insights.

title: NLP Research — RAG & LLMs
description: ★ Advanced research on Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems ★ Fine-tuning large language models for domain-specific knowledge extraction ★ Question-answering tasks with improved retrieval accuracy
impact: Published findings improving retrieval accuracy by 28% over baseline approaches.

title: Parkinson's Disease Detection System
description: ★ ML pipeline for early detection of Parkinson's disease using biomedical signal data ★ Classification models with feature engineering ★ High accuracy for early-stage diagnosis support
impact: Achieved high classification accuracy for early-stage Parkinson's detection.

title: Multi-class Skin Disease Classification
description: ★ Deep learning model for classifying multiple skin disease types from dermatological images ★ Advanced preprocessing, data augmentation, and transfer learning ★ Improved multi-class classification accuracy
impact: Improved multi-class classification accuracy for dermatological diagnosis support.

title: Image Classification — CIFAR-10
description: ★ Deep learning image classification trained on CIFAR-10 ★ CNN architectures with optimization techniques ★ High-accuracy object recognition across 10 categories
impact: Robust image classifier across 10 object categories with optimized architecture.

title: Gold Price Prediction
description: ★ ML model for predicting gold prices using historical market data ★ Exploratory data analysis and feature engineering ★ Regression modeling for financial forecasting
impact: Accurate gold price forecasting with comprehensive market trend analysis.

title: Netflix Analytics Dashboard
description: ★ Interactive analytics dashboard visualizing Netflix content trends ★ Genre distributions, release patterns, and regional content analysis ★ Dynamic filtering and drill-down capabilities across 8,000+ titles
impact: Comprehensive visual analysis of 8,000+ Netflix titles with interactive filters.

title: Student Engagement and Interest Dashboard
description: ★ Interactive Tableau dashboard analyzing student engagement across academic, social, navigation, and wellness categories ★ Dynamic filtering, KPI tracking, and subcategory insights ★ Data-driven decision-making for student programs
impact: Analyzed 300+ student responses, identifying high-engagement categories and enabling actionable insights for student programs and planning.
